name: Regina's NCPD Headquarters
description: It seems helping Regina with the Cyberphyscos problem REALLY DID pay off in the end: She’s been “Hired” by the NCPD and the “Official” Headquarters is now FULLY DECKED OUT with NCPD Tracking Equipment, Display Screens and even a BRAND NEW AV Landing Pad on the Roof for easy access to the HQ ! Night City WILL, BE SAVE UNDER OUR EYES !
